chorus.label: Refrain
chorus.content:
Praise the Lord, praise the Lord,
let the earth hear His voice!
Praise the Lord, praise the Lord,
let the people rejoice!
O come to the Father through Jesus the Son,
and give Him the glory, great things He hath done.

verses.content:
To God be the glory, great things He hath done,
so loved He the world that He gave us His Son,
who yielded His life an atonement for sin,
and opened the life-gate that all may go in.

O perfect redemption, the purchase of blood,
to ev'ry believer the promise of God;
the vilest offender who truly believes,
that moment from Jesus a pardon receives.

Great things He hath taught us, great things He hath done,
and great our rejoicing through Jesus the Son;
but purer, and higher, and greater will be
our wonder, our transport, when Jesus we see.

chorus.label: Ìpèdè
chorus.content:
Yìn Olúwa, yìn Olúwa,
kí ayé gbọ́ ohùn Rẹ̀!
Yìn Olúwa, yìn Olúwa,
kí àwọn ènìyàn yọ̀!
Ẹ wá sọ́dọ̀ Baba nípasẹ̀ Jesu Ọmọ,
kí ẹ sì fi ògo fún Un, ohun ńlá ni Ó ṣe.

verses.content:
Fún Ọlọ́run ni ògo, ohun ńlá ni Ó ṣe,
Ó fẹ́ ayé tó bẹ́ẹ̀ tí Ó fi Ọmọ Rẹ̀ fún wa,
Ẹni tí Ó fi ẹ̀mí Rẹ̀ rúbọ fún ètùtù ẹ̀ṣẹ̀,
Ó sì ṣí ẹnu-ọ̀nà ìyè sílẹ̀ kí gbogbo ènìyàn lè wọlé.

Ìràpadà pípé, tí ẹ̀jẹ̀ Rẹ̀ rà,
ílérí Ọlọ́run fún gbogbo ẹni tí ó gbàgbọ́;
ẹlẹ́ṣẹ̀ tí ó buru jù, bí ó bá gbàgbọ́ tòótọ́,
ní àkókò náà ni Jesu yóò fi ìdáríjì fún un.

Ohun ńlá ni Ó kọ́ wa, ohun ńlá ni Ó ṣe,
ayọ̀ wa sì pọ̀ nípasẹ̀ Jesu Ọmọ;
ṣùgbọ́n mímọ́ jù, gíga jù, àti ńlá jù ni yóò jẹ́
ìyanu àti ayọ̀ wa nígbà tí a bá rí Jesu.

chorus.label: Azịza
chorus.content:
Too Onyenweanyị, too Onyenweanyị,
ka ụwa nụ olu Ya!
Too Onyenweanyị, too Onyenweanyị,
ka ndị mmadụ ṅụrịa!
Bịakwutenụ Nna site n’aka Jizọs Ọkpara,
nyekwa Ya otuto, nnukwu ihe ka O meworo.

verses.content:
Nye Chineke otuto, nnukwu ihe ka O meworo,
O hụrụ ụwa n’anya nke ukwuu, O nyere anyị Ọkpara Ya,
Onye nyere ndụ Ya ka ọ bụrụ mgbapụta maka mmehie,
ma meghee ọnụ ụzọ ndụ ka mmadụ niile nwee ike ịbanye.

Mgbapụta zuru oke, nke e ji ọbara zụta,
nkwa Chineke nyere onye ọ bụla kwere ekwe;
onye mmehie kacha njọ, ma ọ bụrụ na o kwere n’eziokwu,
n’oge ahụ ka ọ na-anata mgbaghara site n’aka Jizọs.

Nnukwu ihe ka Ọ kụziiri anyị, nnukwu ihe ka Ọ meworo,
anyị na-aṅụrịkwa ọṅụ nke ukwuu site n’aka Jizọs Ọkpara;
ma nke dị ọcha karị, dị elu karị, dịkwa ukwuu karị ga-abụ
ịtụnanya na ọṅụ anyị mgbe anyị ga-ahụ Jizọs.

chorus.label: Refrain
chorus.content:
This is my story, this is my song,
praising my Savior all the day long;
this is my story, this is my song,
praising my Savior all the day long.

verses.content:
Blessed assurance, Jesus is mine!
O, what a foretaste of glory divine!
Heir of salvation, purchase of God,
born of His Spirit, washed in His blood.

Perfect submission, perfect delight,
visions of rapture now burst on my sight;
angels descending, bring from above
echoes of mercy, whispers of love.

Perfect submission, all is at rest,
I in my Savior am happy and blest;
watching and waiting, looking above,
filled with His goodness, lost in His love.

chorus.label: Ìpèdè
chorus.content:
Èyí ni ìtàn mi, èyí ni orin mi,
ní yíyin Olùgbàlà mi ní gbogbo ọjọ́;
èyí ni ìtàn mi, èyí ni orin mi,
ní yíyin Olùgbàlà mi ní gbogbo ọjọ́.

verses.content:
Ìdánilójú ìbùkún, Jesu jẹ́ ti mi!
Ìtọ́wo ògo Ọlọ́run ni èyí tó dára tó!
Ajogún ìgbàlà, ẹni tí Ọlọ́run rà,
ti a bí nípa Ẹ̀mí Rẹ̀, tí a sì wẹ̀ nínú ẹ̀jẹ̀ Rẹ̀.

Ìtẹríba pípé, ayọ̀ pípé,
ìran ayọ̀ ọ̀run ń hàn gbangba sí mi;
áwọn angẹli ń sọ̀kalẹ̀, wọ́n mú láti òkè wá
ìró àánú àti ìròyìn ìfẹ́.

Ìtẹríba pípé, ohun gbogbo wà ní ìsinmi,
 inú Olùgbàlà mi ni mo ti ní ayọ̀ àti ìbùkún;
mo ń ṣọ́, mo sì ń dúró, mo ń wo òkè,
mo kún fún oore Rẹ̀, mo sì sọnù nínú ìfẹ́ Rẹ̀.

chorus.label: Azịza
chorus.content:
Nke a bụ akụkọ m, nke a bụ abụ m,
ịto Onye Nzọpụta m ụbọchị niile;
nke a bụ akụkọ m, nke a bụ abụ m,
ịto Onye Nzọpụta m ụbọchị niile.

verses.content:
Nkwenye ngọzi, Jizọs bụ nke m!
Lee ụdị ụtọ mbụ nke ebube Chineke!
Onye nketa nke nzọpụta, onye Chineke zụtara,
amụrụ site n’ime Mmụọ Ya, sachapụtakwa n’ọbara Ya.

Nrubeisi zuru oke, obi ụtọ zuru oke,
ọhụhụ nke ọṅụ eluigwe apụtawo n’ihu m;
ndị mmụọ ozi na-arịdata, na-eweta site n’elu
ụda ebere na nkwupụta ịhụnanya.

Nrubeisi zuru oke, ihe niile dị n’udo,
n’ime Onye Nzọpụta m ka m na-enwe obi ụtọ na ngọzi;
na-ele anya ma na-eche, na-elekwasị anya n’elu,
jupụtara n’ịdị mma Ya, tufuru onwe m n’ịhụnanya Ya.
